testScenario: End-to-end parcel lifecycle verification: from pickup-code capture through active tracking, pickup confirmation, archival, soft-delete, restore, and permanent deletion.

steps.name: 取件码捕获 (Pickup code captured)
steps.description: Pickup code is extracted from a whitelisted courier notification or manual entry.

steps.name: 自动解析通知内容 (Notification content auto-parsed)
steps.description: Courier, code, and pickup location parsed from notification text.

steps.name: 入库存储 (Persisted to database)
steps.description: Parcel record written to Room database with encrypted fields.

steps.name: 状态=待取件 (Status = pending pickup)
steps.description: Initial status set to 'pending pickup'.

steps.name: 列表展示 (Displayed in active list)
steps.description: New parcel appears at the top of the active parcel list.

steps.name: 提醒推送 (Reminder scheduled)
steps.description: Pickup reminder scheduled via AlarmManager / WorkManager.

steps.name: 用户标记已取 (User marks as picked up)
steps.description: User taps 'mark picked up' action on the parcel.

steps.name: 状态=已取件 (Status = picked up)
steps.description: Status transitions to 'picked up'.

steps.name: 取件时间记录 (Pickup timestamp recorded)
steps.description: Pickup timestamp stored on the record.

steps.name: 取件码失效标记 (Code marked invalid)
steps.description: Pickup code marked as used/invalid to prevent reuse confusion.

steps.name: 移至历史 (Moved to history)
steps.description: Picked-up parcel moves from active list to history list.

steps.name: 历史列表展示 (History list display)
steps.description: Parcel visible in the history tab with correct status and timestamp.

steps.name: 用户编辑备注 (User edits notes)
steps.description: User adds/edits a note on the parcel record.

steps.name: 备注保存 (Notes persisted)
steps.description: Notes saved to database and survive app restart.

steps.name: 用户删除 (User initiates delete)
steps.description: User deletes the parcel from the history list.

steps.name: 软删除标记 (Soft-delete marked)
steps.description: Record is soft-deleted (deleted_at set), not removed from database.

steps.name: 回收站展示 (Trash / recycle bin display)
steps.description: Deleted parcel appears in the trash/recycle bin view.

steps.name: 恢复操作 (Restore operation)
steps.description: User restores the parcel from the trash.

steps.name: 状态恢复 (Status restored)
steps.description: Parcel returns to the history list with its prior status intact.

steps.name: 彻底删除 (Permanent delete)
steps.description: User permanently deletes the parcel from the trash.

steps.name: 数据库清理 (Database row removed)
steps.description: Permanent delete removes the row from the database; encrypted code wiped.

steps.name: 审计日志记录 (Audit log entry)
steps.description: Lifecycle events (create, status change, delete, restore, purge) recorded in the local audit log.

_meta.description: Parcel lifecycle verification template with 22 sequential steps from capture to permanent deletion.
